channel.title: Home on Sarzil Hossain
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Sarzil Hossain

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Of course, there’s no necessity to reiterate what has already been taught on the internet at last a thousand times and I do not consider myself experienced enough to mentor others. However, I will be making blog posts on my learning journey and explaining different concepts in tech, to share my experience and also so I can refer to them in future.
